# ScanBusinessCard

> AI-powered bulk business card scanner for sales teams. Scan 20+ cards in a
> single photo, extract structured contact data automatically, and export
> leads to Slack, HubSpot, or Google Sheets. Built for trade shows and events
> where speed and never losing a lead matter most.

## What it does

- Bulk scanning: capture many business cards in one photo instead of one at a time.
- AI data capture: extracts name, title, company, email, and phone.
- CRM export: push captured leads to Slack, HubSpot, and Google Sheets.
- Event organization: group leads by event for follow-up.
- Native iOS app (in progress) plus a web app; account deletion and privacy controls built in.

## Key pages

- [Home](https://scanbusinesscard.com/): product overview and how it works.
- [Pricing](https://scanbusinesscard.com/pricing): Free and Pro (monthly/yearly) plans.
- [Sign in / Sign up](https://scanbusinesscard.com/auth): Google, Apple, or email.
- [Privacy Policy](https://scanbusinesscard.com/privacy)
- [Terms](https://scanbusinesscard.com/terms)

- [vs CamCard](https://scanbusinesscard.com/compare/camcard)
- [vs ABBYY Business Card Reader](https://scanbusinesscard.com/compare/abbyy)
- [vs Sansan](https://scanbusinesscard.com/compare/sansan)
- [vs HubSpot business card scanner](https://scanbusinesscard.com/compare/hubspot-scanner)
- [vs Evernote](https://scanbusinesscard.com/compare/evernote)
- [CamCard alternative](https://scanbusinesscard.com/camcard-alternative-bulk-scanner)
- [Popl alternative](https://scanbusinesscard.com/popl-physical-card-scanner-alternative)
- [ScanBizCards alternative](https://scanbusinesscard.com/scanbizcards-alternative-trade-show-speed)
- [Haystack alternative](https://scanbusinesscard.com/haystack-alternative-sales-teams)
